product.title: WOKE UP LIKE THIS FLAWLESS Gel BASE FOUNDATION - 30 ML (35)
featureBullets: Buildable Medium-To-High Coverage Natural Matte Finish Optically-Corrective Powders Enriched With: Vitamin E For Anti-Aging Benefits Hyaluronic Acid For Hydration, Protection And Filling Wrinkles
product.description: Woke Up Like This Foundation makeup smooths and evens the skin with an advanced, innovative formula that instantly minimizes the appearance of shadows and pores, effortlessly enhances the complexion and generates a flawless natural matte finish. Easy buildability meets ultimate blendability in its ultra-fluid texture, becoming one with the skin for traceless, uniform medium-to-high coverage. Special optically corrective powders blur fine lines, redness, and blemishes while light-diffusing spheres deflect attention away from all imperfections. This foundation makeup is streak-free in application and lightweight in feel for comfortable wear.

variants.title: 1 Fl Oz (Pack of 1) Soft Light Beige

specification.value: Provides lightweight, buildable coverage with anti-aging and hydrating benefits for a flawless matte finish
#35,554 in Beauty & Personal Care (See Top 100 in Beauty & Personal Care) #319 in Foundation Makeup

reviewsInfo.customersSay: Customers find this foundation to be the best makeup they've used, with nice coverage that's not too thick or heavy. The color match receives mixed feedback - while some say it's a perfect match for their skin tone, others report the color being off. The texture also gets mixed reviews, with some appreciating how it looks on their face, while one customer mentions it emphasized their pores.

reviews.reviewText: I actually get this right from Il Makiage. Based out of New York, prices are good and they have subscriptions you can get which gives you big discounts. When applied, you absolutely do not know it’s on. Il Makiage from the website will ask you questions and if you answer honestly will match your shade perfectly. Don’t know how they do it but they do. You will never regret purchasing whether it be there or here. Just be sure you know what shade or you might be disappointed.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on January 21, 2026

reviews.reviewTitle: Nice coverage, I gave in a bought this, and I am happy with it
reviews.reviewText: Liking this foundation!!! I saw a ton of adverts for it on Instagram, and was like "enough already Il Makiage!!!" (LOL), but in the end I gave in. I do like it. I apply with a brush, it stays on all 8 hours at work, easy to remove at night. Then I do a full cleanse and moisturize of the my face. I am happy with the shade too. It is not moisturizing, so you have to moisturize well in between use.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on February 18, 2026

reviews.reviewText: Definitely not the coverage I had seen on TV but the color match is perfect
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 7, 2026

reviews.reviewText: Don't waste your money! It doesn't cover anything. I was really hoping this would work, the color that they suggested for me was the wrong color
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on January 12, 2026
Reviewed in the United States on March 9, 2026
Reviewed in the United States on March 13, 2026

reviews.reviewTitle: Very visible, not sheer at all
reviews.reviewText: This product made it look like I was wearing heavy foundation and emphasized my pores. I applied with a sponge and blended well, but it looked like I had a lot of foundation on, while my usual foundation that I mix 50/50 with lotion looks like I have no foundation on. I'll stick to that and just put cover stick on imperfections. I don't like the heavy foundation look for myself, but this might be good for someone who has serious imperfections to conceal. The color did match well, it's just not the look I'm going for.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on September 8, 2023

reviews.reviewText: I tested it on my hands and it covered my sun spots, so I was excited. Then I tried it on my face and I sure didn't look radiant, like the videos. I took the quiz, so I expected moisture, but it feels dry. I'm wondering if it's been in Amazon's stock long enough to dry out.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on February 10, 2024
